title: Sembang Santai di Majlis
opening: Hai, selamat malam. Seronok ke majlis ni? Saya rasa makanan kat sini sedap sangat!

t1.prompt: Hai, selamat malam. Seronok ke majlis ni? Saya rasa makanan kat sini sedap sangat!
t1.promptTranslation: Hai, se-la-mat ma-lam. Se-ro-nok ke ma-jlis ni? Sa-ya ra-sa ma-ka-nan kat si-ni se-dap sa-ngat! — Hi, good evening. Are you enjoying this event? I think the food here is really delicious!

t2.prompt: Baguslah kalau seronok! Atau kalau biasa-biasa pun, harap awak dapat berehat. Awak selalu buat apa pada hujung minggu?
t2.promptTranslation: Ba-gus-lah ka-lau se-ro-nok! A-tau ka-lau bia-sa-bia-sa pun, ha-rap a-wak da-pat be-re-hat. A-wak se-la-lu bu-at a-pa pa-da hu-jung ming-gu? — That's good if you're enjoying it! Or if it's just so-so, I hope you get to relax. What do you usually do on weekends?

t3_culture_or_relax.prompt: Oh, menarik! Sama ada membaca atau berehat, kita perlukan masa untuk diri sendiri. Awak ada buku/filem kegemaran, atau makanan santai yang wajib ada?
t3_culture_or_relax.promptTranslation: Oh, me-na-rik! Sa-ma a-da mem-ba-ca a-tau be-re-hat, ki-ta per-lu-kan ma-sa un-tuk di-ri sen-di-ri. A-wak a-da bu-ku/fi-lem ke-ge-ma-ran, a-tau ma-ka-nan san-tai yang wa-jib a-da? — Oh, interesting! Whether reading or relaxing, we need time for ourselves. Do you have a favorite book/movie, or a must-have comfort food?

t3_sport_or_travel.prompt: Bagus tu! Sukan atau melancong, kedua-duanya buat kita aktif. Awak main sukan apa/pergi mana baru-baru ni? Atau ada tempat impian?
t3_sport_or_travel.promptTranslation: Ba-gus tu! Su-kan a-tau me-lan-cong, ke-dua-du-a-nya bu-at ki-ta ak-tif. A-wak ma-in su-kan a-pa/per-gi ma-na ba-ru-ba-ru ni? A-tau a-da tem-pat im-pi-an? — That's great! Sports or travel, both keep us active. What sport do you play/where have you been recently? Or do you have a dream place?

t4.prompt: Menarik sekali! Saya pun teringin nak cuba/lawat. Mungkin saya patut cuba/lawat nanti. Terima kasih atas perkongsian!
t4.promptTranslation: Me-na-rik se-ka-li! Sa-ya pun te-ri-ngin nak cu-ba/la-wat. Mu-ngkin sa-ya pa-tut cu-ba/la-wat nan-ti. Te-ri-ma ka-sih a-tas per-kong-si-an! — Very interesting! I'd love to try/visit that too. Maybe I should try/visit it later. Thanks for sharing!

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, boleh ulang apa yang awak cakap? Saya tak berapa jelas.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Ma-af, bo-leh u-lang a-pa yang a-wak ca-kap? Sa-ya tak be-ra-pa je-las. — Sorry, could you repeat what you said? I wasn't very clear.

t-end.prompt: Menarik perbualan kita. Tapi saya kena minta diri dulu. Selamat malam!
t-end.promptTranslation: Me-na-rik per-bu-al-an ki-ta. Ta-pi sa-ya ke-na min-ta di-ri du-lu. Se-la-mat ma-lam! — Our conversation was interesting. But I have to excuse myself now. Good evening!
